text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Formulary research file. Each entry 
contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

BN 

LABEL: Brand Name 

DESCRIPTION: This is the brand name of the dispensed PDE, according to the First DataBank (FDB) reference files. The
